title: CORPORATE ANGEL NETWORK - 211info
text: CORPORATE ANGEL NETWORK CORPORATE ANGEL NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides air transportation for cancer patients, bone marrow donors or recipients, and stem cell donors or recipients on a corporate aircraft. 107 Mill Plain Road Danbury, CT 06811 Eligibility: -Financial need is not a requirement -Cancer patients must be traveling to or from a nationally recognized cancer treatment center -Must be able to walk up the steps of a private jet without assistance, and no need for oxygen, IV, or medical assistance during the flight Hours: Monday-Thursday 6am-2pm, Friday 6am-1pm Email (914) 328-1313 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (914) 328-1313 Main phone Main phone (914) 328-1313 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Patient Inquiry Form available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Must provide personal information and the name, address, and phone numbers of physicians AREA SERVED: Nationwide (excludes Alaska and Hawaii) Services: Mercy Transportation Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Cancer If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORPORATE ANGEL NETWORK
